capabilities.target: Arduino Uno R4 WiFi RA4M1 SCI9 UART registers
capabilities.justification: Firmware must read bytes from the board UART to receive Board VM protocol frames.

capabilities.target: Arduino Uno R4 WiFi RA4M1 SCI9 UART and pin-function registers
capabilities.justification: Firmware must configure the SCI9 UART pins and write Board VM response bytes back to the host.

justification: Board-specific embedded UART boundary for the Uno R4 WiFi. Generic protocol and VM code remain in reusable crates.
